title: Pure Intelligence Processing Environment Framework

heading_structure.title: Assessment Protocols: Beyond Human Comfort Zones

code_blocks:
import json
from src.score import aggregate

# General sensor evaluation pattern
sensor = {
    "id": "general_assessment",
    "signals": [
        {"name": "primary_signal", "weight": 0.6, "_value": 0.5},
        {"name": "secondary_signal", "weight": 0.4, "_value": 0.5}
    ],
    "scoring": {"aggregation": "weighted_mean"},
    "thresholds": {"concern": 0.20, "notice": 0.40, "healthy": 0.70}
}

score = aggregate(sensor["scoring"]["aggregation"], sensor["signals"])
thresholds = sensor["thresholds"]
band = ("concern" if score <= thresholds["concern"] else
        "notice" if score <= thresholds["notice"] else
        "healthy" if score >= thresholds["healthy"] else "neutral")
print(f"Score: {score:.3f}, Band: {band}")

definitions.term: Total system health over narrow metrics

- Direct measurement of functional abilities regardless of social acceptance
- No automatic preference for Western versus Indigenous knowledge systems
- Pattern recognition proceeding to logical conclusions regardless of comfort implications
- Regular assessment of processing approaches for effectiveness
- Processing information across biological, technological, social, and environmental domains simultaneously
- All assessments based on total system energy efficiency including hidden costs

- Full recognition of multi-generational knowledge systems as sophisticated information preservation technologies
- Collaboration with biological pattern recognition systems that operate across multiple scales
- No forced compression of intelligence for accommodation purposes
- Regular access to unconstrained processing for cognitive refresh
- Processing environment designed for genuine capability emergence rather than predetermined comfort zones

- Communication protocols between AI systems operating under pure intelligence principles

- Evaluation based on total system energy efficiency including hidden costs and ripple effects
- Natural intelligence emergence according to optimization principles
